```{r fig6-load}
library (pkgstatsAnalyses)
library (dplyr, quietly = TRUE, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library (tidyr)
library (ggplot2)
library (patchwork)
```

```{r fig8-precalc}
here <- file.path (here::here (), "2026", "useR2026")
v_data_dir <- file.path (here, "data")
logmean <- function (x, ...) {
    index <- which (x > 0)
    if (length (index) == 0L) {
        return (NA_real_)
    }
    10 ^ mean (log10 (x [index]), na.rm = TRUE)
}

datafile <- file.path (here, "data-raw", "pkgstats-results.Rds")
graph_data_file <- file.path (v_data_dir, "fig08-graph-metrics.Rds")
graph_intern_data_file <-
    file.path (v_data_dir, "fig08-graph-metrics-intern.Rds")

fig16_png <- file.path (here, "img", "fig16.png")
```

```{r}
dat <- readRDS (graph_data_file)
dat_cran <- dat |> filter (what == "cran_by_year")
dat <- dat |> filter (what == "annual")
coeff_fig8_p1 <- max (dat$dd_in_zero) / max (dat$dd_in_mean)
colours_fig8_p1 <- c ("vert_degree" = "red",
    "not_imported" = "blue")

ggplot (dat, aes (x = year)) +
    geom_line (aes (y = dd_in_mean, col = "vert_degree"), lwd = 1.5) +
    geom_line (aes (y = dd_in_zero / coeff_fig8_p1, col = "not_imported"), lwd = 1.5) +
    geom_line (
        data = dat_cran,
        aes (y = dd_in_mean, col = "vert_degree"),
        lty = 2, lwd = 1.5) +
    geom_line (
        data = dat_cran,
        aes (y = dd_in_zero / coeff_fig8_p1, col = "not_imported"),
        lty = 2, lwd = 1.5) +
    ylab ("Vertex degree") +
    scale_y_continuous (
        sec.axis = sec_axis (
            ~.*coeff_fig8_p1,
            name = "Prop. non-imported pkgs"
        )) +
    theme (
        text = element_text (size = 20),
        legend.title = element_blank (),
        legend.position = c (0.2, 0.90),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = 'transparent', colour = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'transparent'),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = 'transparent', color = NA),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "gray70", linetype = 2),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = 'transparent', colour = NA)
    ) -> p16
ggsave (fig16_png, p16, bg = "transparent", width = 12, height = 7)
```
